agent-native-catalog.note: Hard requirement. Applied to all 35 entries. Zero false positives.

yaml-only-direct-push.note: Best practice for data-only commits. No regressions across 3 pushes.

auto-pipeline-for-curation.note: Cross-domain pattern. 5 successful pipeline runs including 6-track parallel enhancement.

execFileSync-over-execSync.note: Security: never use execSync(string). 3 files migrated. No regressions.

test-for-every-skill.note: Every skill MUST have a test file. 12+2=14 untested skills identified and fixed. 47 skills covered.

batch-catalog-additions.note: New rule from incremental-catalog-runs anti-pattern. Not yet exercised.

append-not-insert-yaml.note: New rule from mid-file-yaml-edits anti-pattern. Not yet exercised.

jaccard-originality-check.note: Shingle-based Jaccard similarity check. 47 skills checked, worst 19.3%, zero false positives.

verify-gate-before-advance.note: Prevents skipping quality gates. Verified across Phase 1 (10 transitions) and 6-track build.

skill-structural-linter.note: Structural lint check. 47 skills, 41 clean, 6 warnings, 0 errors.

six-track-parallel-execution.note: 6 independent tracks dispatched in parallel with zero file conflicts. 50 files, 5858 insertions.

owasp-security-scan-asi-patterns.note: 40 detection patterns across OWASP ASI01-ASI08. 47 skills scanned, 0 CRITICAL findings.

mcp-discovery-well-known.note: RFC Cloudflare .well-known/agent-skills/index.json format. 47 skill modules indexed with SHA-256 digests.

test-convention-node-test.note: Declare test_convention: node:test before subagent dispatch. Prevented mixed imports during 6-track integration. All new tests use node:test imports.

writeIndex-arg-validation.note: Validated by D-grade fix session. writeIndex('.', '.well-known/agent-skills/index.json') corrupted index. Arg validation now prevents recurrence.

quality-score-persist-check.note: Validated by D-grade fix session. computeAllToolScores() returned correct values but didn't persist. Explicit writeQualityScores() call required.

yaml-edit-use-tool-not-string.note: Validated by D-grade fix session. Inline YAML string construction caused escape errors. Edit tool for YAML blocks prevents this.

deep-research-before-design.note: 4 community patterns (AI-DLC, copilot-orchestra, ABIvan-Tech, Agentic Dev Playbook) validated 5-phase workflow design before writing.

stress-tested-plan-structure.note: 7-section plan structure (CEO, Eng, Design, Risk, Tasks, AC, Decisions) produced comprehensive, low-risk plan.

fn-tostring-schema-generation.note: fn.toString() + regex parses method signatures into JSON Schema for MCP tools. 49 skills auto-schema'd without modification. JSDoc ~10% coverage so name-based fallback critical.

isError-structured-err.note: MCP tool errors must include isError:true + structured content with 'suggestion' field. Agents infer next steps from suggestions.

token-budget-truncation.note: TokenOptimizer caps responses at 4000 tokens. Strategy: first 50% + last 20% with summary preserves context. ANSI strip before truncation.

dead-dep-audit.note: Periodic check for ESM-only deps (chalk v5, ora v7) that cannot be require()'d from CJS. Removed chalk+ora, installed @modelcontextprotocol/sdk.

mcp-server-tested.note: MCP adapter integration tests: listTools, callTool, token optimization, error handling, batch calls. All 11 node:test suites pass.

named-param-schema.note: SchemaGenerator extracts named params from fn.toString(). Agents no longer guess positional _args. Default values included in schema.

eslint-prefer-const.note: Unified .eslintrc.js enforces prefer-const, no-var, eqeqeq, curly, quotes: single, semi. Eliminated .eslintrc.json duplication.

catalog-yaml-valid.note: YAML validated every time. Zero syntax errors across 35 entries.

catalog-category-count.note: Category counts verified. All hitting targets. 6 gap finds.

test-suite.note: 762 Jest tests + 63 node:test = 825 total. 77 Jest suites + 11 node:test suites. All pass after MCP adapter integration.

handoff-templates.note: Verifies all 8 handoff docs exist. Never failed.

phase-gates-doc.note: Verifies gates.md has all phase transitions documented. Never failed.

index-json-integrity.note: Validates .well-known/agent-skills/index.json matches on-disk skills. 49 entries verified (removed deployment/railway duplicate).

quality-scores.note: Validates catalog/quality-scores.json covers all 35 tools. All scored, no D-grade tools.

security-scan.note: OWASP ASI01-ASI08 scan of all 47 skills. 0 CRITICAL findings.

spec-gates-g09-g14.note: 6 new spec enforcement gates (G09-G14). All pass on current skills.

node-test-suite.note: node:test runner for excluded files. 63 tests across 11 suites. SchemaGenerator, TokenOptimizer, PerformanceOptimizer, MCPAdapter all covered.

state-machine-valid.note: Validates state.json state_machine has exactly 6 entries matching 5-phase model: scope, build, verify, ship, evolve, done.

test-suite-always-run.note: Always run test suite on SHIP gate regardless of code vs docs changes. Prevents zero-regression assumption gaps.

proposed_rules.name: use-handoff-at-transitions
proposed_rules.reason: Every phase transition must produce a handoff.md using docs/handoffs/ templates. Prevents context loss between layers.

tdd.reason: No production code in curation projects. Rule had zero applicability.

mid-file-yaml-edits.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: append-not-insert-yaml.

incremental-catalog-runs.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: batch-catalog-additions.

verify-before-describe.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: pre-verify-tool-metadata.

pre-verify-tool-metadata.reason: Never implemented. 0 fires. Replaced by test-for-every-skill + regex-in-jest-config.

proposed.description: VERIFY phase must use separate agent invocation with /clear and fresh context
proposed.rationale: Independent agent catches blind spots that build agent misses (community pattern from ShepAlderson/copilot-orchestra)

proposed.description: Harness check: state.json state_machine must be exactly [scope, build, verify, ship, evolve, done]
proposed.rationale: Ensures new 5-phase workflow is enforced; prevents drift back to 11-phase
proposed.trigger: on state.json write and at harness phase
